title: Minimum parameters for cybersecurity inherent risk assessment
summary: This attachment is a minimum baseline parameter or indicator that the Bank can use to assess the four inherent risk factors for cyber security.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Monitor risk exposure from 'Cybersecurity inherent risk assessment minimum parameters' via executive dashboard. Make sure it is aligned with the company's risk appetite.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Minimum parameters of cyber security inherent risk assessment'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Minimum parameters for assessing inherent risks of cyber security'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Cybersecurity inherent risk assessment format
summary: This appendix provides the official format that the Bank uses to document the results of its assessment of inherent risks related to cybersecurity.

roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify the policy/SOP document for 'Cybersecurity inherent risk assessment format'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Definition of cybersecurity inherent risk rating
summary: This appendix contains definitions of Rank 1 to Rank 5 for determining the inherent risk level of cyber security.
